posting: Kickstart your career with Maplestone Health, where we're hiring a remote Intern Frontend Developer to join our Seattle, WA-based team. This internship is ideal for someone just starting out—no prior professional experience required—who holds (or is pursuing) a Master's in a quantitative field. You'll work hands-on with JavaScript, React, Next.js, Redux, and CSS to build clean, responsive interfaces, and familiarity with GraphQL is a welcome bonus. We offer compensation of up to $13,000 USD per month for this role.

Brightside Studio is hiring a Lead Backend Engineer to drive the architecture and delivery of our core services from our London, UK base, with a hybrid working arrangement. You'll bring at least 8 years of backend experience, a Master's degree, and deep expertise in Python, Java, gRPC, and Redis; familiarity with PostgreSQL is a welcome plus. This full-time leadership role offers a salary between £120,000 and £140,000 per year. If you're ready to set the technical direction and mentor a talented team, we'd love to hear from you.

Cobalt Robotics is hiring a Lead DevOps Engineer to anchor our infrastructure team on a temporary, onsite basis in Austin, TX. You'll own our deployment pipelines and cloud environments, so deep experience with Docker, CI/CD, and AWS is required; familiarity with Kubernetes, Terraform, and Linux will help you hit the ground running. This is a senior leadership role that calls for at least 10 years of hands-on experience and a Master's degree. We're offering CAD 115,000–140,000 per year for the right candidate ready to take charge.

Cobalt Robotics is seeking a Senior DevOps Engineer to join our team onsite in Seattle, WA for a contract engagement. You'll bring at least 8 years of experience along with a strong command of Linux administration, Ansible, and building robust CI/CD pipelines. Familiarity with Kubernetes, Terraform, and AWS is a definite plus and will help you hit the ground running. A Bachelor's degree is required for this role.

Brightside Studio is hiring a mid-level Data Scientist to join our London-based team in a hybrid, full-time capacity. You'll bring at least 3 years of hands-on experience and a Master's degree, applying your analytical skills to real-world challenges. Strong proficiency in R and TensorFlow is essential for this role. If you're ready to turn data into impact, we'd love to hear from you.

Northwind Labs is hiring a fully remote Lead Data Scientist to anchor our analytics team from anywhere, with our home base in Toronto, Canada. This full-time leadership role calls for at least 12 years of experience, a Master's degree, and deep hands-on expertise with scikit-learn, R, and SQL; familiarity with Python, pandas, and TensorFlow would be a strong plus. You'll set the technical direction for our modeling efforts and mentor a growing group of data professionals. We offer a competitive salary ranging from CAD 145,000 to 160,000 per year.

Vantage AI is seeking a seasoned VP of Engineering to lead our technical organization on a contract basis out of Austin, TX, with a hybrid schedule that balances in-office collaboration and remote flexibility. This executive role calls for at least 15 years of engineering experience and a Bachelor's degree, paired with deep hands-on expertise across GraphQL, Android, and Swift. If you're ready to set technical direction and mentor teams at scale, we'd love to hear from you.

Harborview Tech is hiring a full-time Junior Backend Engineer to join our team in Seattle, WA. In this role, you'll build and maintain reliable backend services, and we're looking for someone with at least 2 years of experience and a Bachelor's in Computer Science. Strong skills in Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, and gRPC are required, while familiarity with Kubernetes, Python, and Kafka is a definite plus. We offer a competitive salary ranging from $135,000 to $155,000 per year.

Vantage AI is hiring a Junior Product Manager to join our Seattle team in a hybrid, full-time role. You'll partner closely with cross-functional teams, so strong stakeholder management is essential, along with hands-on experience using Figma and running A/B testing to validate product decisions; familiarity with analytics is a plus. We're looking for someone with at least 2 years of experience who's eager to grow. This position offers an annual salary between $160,000 and $175,000 USD.

Lumen Analytics is hiring a Lead Product Manager to drive the vision and roadmap for our growing platform. This full-time, fully remote role is based out of Toronto, Canada and offers a salary of CAD 175,000–190,000 per year. We're looking for a seasoned product leader with at least 8 years of experience, hands-on proficiency in Figma, and a strong command of Analytics to guide data-informed decisions; familiarity with SQL is a welcome plus. A Bachelor's in Computer Science is required for this leadership position.

Ready to grow your product career? Northwind Labs is hiring a full-time Junior Product Manager to join our team in Austin, TX, on a hybrid schedule. You'll own roadmapping efforts and collaborate closely with engineering and design, so comfort with SQL and Figma is essential, while experience with A/B testing, stakeholder management, and analytics will help you stand out. This role calls for a bachelor's degree and at least one year of experience, and offers a salary between $145,000 and $160,000 per year.

Acme Cloud is seeking a VP of Engineering to lead our technical organization in this full-time, executive-level role. Though the position is listed as Remote (US), this is an onsite role, and we're looking for a seasoned leader with at least 12 years of experience and a Bachelor's in Computer Science. Strong hands-on expertise with Python and Docker is required, as you'll be steering the architecture and scaling of our platform. We offer a competitive salary ranging from CAD 105,000 to 135,000 per year.

Brightside Studio is hiring a fully remote Senior Frontend Developer to join our team, with a home base in Seattle, WA. In this full-time, senior-level role, you'll build polished, performant interfaces using React, Next.js, Tailwind, GraphQL, and modern CSS, so deep hands-on experience across all of these is required. We're looking for someone with at least 6 years of frontend experience and a Bachelor's degree; strong JavaScript fundamentals and TypeScript proficiency are a definite plus. The position offers a salary between $125,000 and $180,000 USD per year.

Brightside Studio is growing, and we're searching for a Junior Frontend Developer to join our fully remote team based out of Berlin, Germany. This is a full-time role perfect for someone with at least a year of experience who's ready to take ownership of real features and grow alongside a supportive crew. You'll need solid hands-on experience with React and Next.js, while familiarity with Redux and Tailwind would be a welcome bonus. If you're early in your career and eager to build polished, modern interfaces, we'd love to hear from you.

Pinecrest Systems is hiring a part-time Engineering Manager to lead one of our distributed product teams. This is a fully remote position based out of London, UK, offering between £160,000 and £195,000 per year. You'll need at least 8 years of experience and a strong command of TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, and GraphQL; familiarity with CSS is a welcome bonus. A Master's degree is required for this manager-level role.

Northwind Labs is hiring a Senior Product Manager to drive the strategy and execution of our growing product portfolio. This is a full-time, fully remote role based out of Austin, TX, ideal for someone with at least 7 years of experience shaping products from concept to launch. You'll own roadmapping and rely on SQL, analytics, and A/B testing to make data-informed decisions, while partnering closely with design using Figma to bring ideas to life. Strong stakeholder management skills are a definite plus as you align cross-functional teams around a shared vision.

Brightside Studio is hiring a full-time, fully remote Engineering Manager to lead and grow our technical team, based out of Austin, TX. You'll bring at least 10 years of experience and deep hands-on expertise with Kubernetes, Docker, Kafka, and PostgreSQL, while guiding architecture decisions and mentoring engineers. Familiarity with AWS is a plus, and a Master's in a quantitative field is required. The role pays between CAD 35 and 50 per hour.

Vantage AI is hiring a full-time Engineering Manager to lead our distributed systems team, a remote (US) role that does require working onsite. You'll bring at least 10 years of engineering experience along with deep hands-on expertise in Go, Java, gRPC, and AWS; familiarity with PostgreSQL is a welcome plus. We're offering €165,000 to €195,000 per year for a manager ready to scale both people and infrastructure. If you thrive at the intersection of technical depth and team leadership, we'd love to hear from you.

Brightside Studio is hiring a Senior Frontend Developer to join our team onsite in Toronto, Canada. This full-time role calls for a seasoned engineer with at least 8 years of experience and strong command of JavaScript, CSS, Tailwind, and Redux; familiarity with TypeScript and GraphQL is a definite plus. We offer a salary between $150,000 and $180,000 USD per year for the right candidate ready to take on senior-level challenges. If you love crafting polished, performant interfaces, we'd love to hear from you.

Maplestone Health is hiring a Senior Mobile Engineer to join our team onsite in New York, NY, building the mobile experiences that connect patients to better care. This full-time, senior-level role calls for at least 7 years of experience and a Master's degree, along with strong hands-on expertise in Android, Kotlin, GraphQL, and React Native; familiarity with iOS and Swift is a welcome plus. We offer compensation ranging from CAD 6,000 to 9,000 per month. If you're ready to lead complex mobile projects in a mission-driven environment, we'd love to hear from you.

Maplestone Health is seeking a Senior DevOps Engineer to join our Austin, TX team on a contract basis. You'll bring at least 7 years of hands-on experience, with strong expertise in Ansible, AWS, and Prometheus essential to succeeding in this role; familiarity with Linux, Docker, and Kubernetes is a definite plus. This contract pays between £95,000 and £130,000 per year. If you're a seasoned engineer ready to take ownership of robust, scalable infrastructure, we'd love to hear from you.

Acme Cloud is hiring a Senior Data Scientist to join our team onsite in Austin, TX, in a full-time capacity. This senior-level role calls for at least 7 years of experience along with a Master's degree, and you'll be expected to bring strong hands-on skills with Spark and pandas. Familiarity with Python, R, and PyTorch would be a welcome plus as you help us turn complex data into real-world impact.

Lumen Analytics is seeking an experienced VP of Engineering to lead our data and platform teams from our Toronto office in this onsite, contract executive role. You'll bring at least 15 years of hands-on engineering leadership and deep expertise across Spark, Python, Kafka, and dbt, with a Bachelor's degree as a baseline requirement. Familiarity with Airflow, Snowflake, and SQL would be a strong asset as you architect and scale our analytics infrastructure. If you're ready to set technical direction and mentor high-performing teams, we'd love to hear from you.

Northwind Labs is hiring a Lead Frontend Developer to anchor our engineering team in Austin, TX, in a hybrid setup that blends in-office collaboration with remote flexibility. This full-time leadership role calls for someone with at least 10 years of experience and deep command of JavaScript, TypeScript, Redux, Next.js, and GraphQL. Familiarity with React, CSS, and Tailwind is a strong plus and will help you hit the ground running. Compensation starts at €80,000 per year.

Brightside Studio is hiring a temporary Engineering Manager to lead our team out of our Seattle, WA office in a hybrid arrangement. This manager-level role offers a salary between £60,000 and £105,000 per year. If you're ready to combine technical depth with team leadership on a fixed-term basis, we'd love to hear from you.
